stories.title: Pip's Lost Gear
stories.story: Once upon a time, a clever little robot named Pip lost his shiny blue gear in the Whispering Woods.

quiz.question: What colour was Pip's lost gear?

stories.story: Luna the rabbit found a glowing silver flower under the moonlight.

stories.story: Max the lion crossed a wooden bridge to help his friend.

stories.story: Tina's bright yellow kite flew high above the green hills.

stories.story: Arjun found a magic pencil that could draw real animals.

stories.story: Sam accidentally let go of his red balloon during the fair.

stories.story: A giant blue whale guided the lost sailors back home.

stories.story: Children planted flowers that bloomed in every colour of the rainbow.
